company_summary: Tyler Technologies is a leading provider of integrated software and technology solutions for the public sector, serving local and state governments across the US. Their product portfolio spans courts, public safety, ERP, tax, appraisal, and citizen engagement platforms. The company has been on a sustained growth trajectory through acquisitions and cloud modernisation of legacy government software.
fit_indicators: Tyler Technologies modernises legacy government systems — Sudheer's core RNTBCI work was legacy modernisation of enterprise Java systems used across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi operations, a direct parallel in complexity and stakeholder scope

PM intern roles at enterprise software companies require internal tooling and workflow product thinking — Sudheer built billing, attendance, and design approval systems at RNTBCI used daily across a large multinational org
Tyler Technologies products integrate identity and access management across government platforms — Sudheer implemented OKTA authentication in production enterprise systems at RNTBCI

PM intern roles increasingly require AI product fluency as govtech vendors embed AI into workflows — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly relevant to emerging product initiatives

Tyler targets technical PMs who can bridge engineering and business stakeholders — Sudheer's background spans 4 years of full-stack Java engineering plus an MBA, matching the hybrid profile Tyler would want in a PM intern

contact_targets.title: Product Manager or Senior Product Manager
contact_targets.function: Product Management — any Tyler vertical (Courts, ERP, Public Safety)
contact_targets.reason: Most likely day-to-day manager or mentor for a PM intern; best person to speak to scope of intern projects and team fit

contact_targets.title: Director of Product Management
contact_targets.function: Product leadership within a Tyler division
contact_targets.reason: Owns intern headcount decisions and can speak to strategic priorities; warm outreach here signals seriousness about the role

contact_targets.title: University Recruiting or Early Careers Recruiter
contact_targets.reason: Handles logistics and screening for the Summer 2026 cohort; useful if no product team contact responds
